inline.all_stats.title: All stats
message.cannot_identify_user: Could not identify the Telegram user.
message.clean.confirm: Delete all your stats? This action cannot be undone.
message.enter_number_first: Send a number first, e.g. 20 (+20) or -20.
message.help:
How it works:

Send a number, e.g. 20. I will then ask where to record the activity (pushups, abs etc.). After that you can view your stats and share your progress with friends.

Commands I understand:

/stat - full stats
/today - stats for today
/yesterday - stats for yesterday
/week - stats for this week
/month - stats for this month
/details - pick a period and get daily scores
/detailed - daily scores for current week
/detailed last week - daily scores for last week
/detailed month - daily scores for current month
/detailed last month - daily scores for last month
/en - switch to English
/ru - switch to Russian
/clean - clear your stats
/help - help

You can add the bot to a group and compete with friends! Add the bot to a group and make it an admin so it can receive commands and see users in the group chat (default permissions are enough). After that, group commands will be available in the chat showing the leaderboard. To be counted in the leaderboard, just confirm participation by pressing the button under it.

Group commands:

/top - today's leaderboard
/top week - this week's leaderboard
/top month - this month's leaderboard
/top last day - yesterday's leaderboard
/top last week - last week's leaderboard
/top last month - last month's leaderboard
message.input_error.invalid:
I didn't get that :/
Send a number, e.g. 20, +20 or -20
message.input_error.too_large:
Value is too large.

You can send a number from -{max_amount} to +{max_amount}, except 0.
message.input_error.zero:
Zero does not change stats.

Send a number from -{max_amount} to +{max_amount}, except 0.
For example: 20, +20 or -20.
message.limit_error:
Cannot {action} {amount_text}.

The total would become {attempted_total}, but the {bound_label} is {bound_value}.
Current total today: {current_text}.
message.start:
Hi! I help track your fitness and compete with friends.

How it works:

1. Send a number, e.g. 20, +20 or -20.
2. Choose an activity (pushups, abs etc.) with a button.
3. PROFIT! :)

/help - learn more!
